name: Telegram Userbot
description: A simple Telethon-based Telegram userbot that updates your profile name with a custom emoji on startup.
author: Your Name

API_ID.description: Your Telegram App API ID from my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram App API Hash from my.telegram.org

STRING_SESSION.description: Telethon StringSession — generate it locally by running generate_session.py

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'Userbot deployed! Check logs: heroku logs --tail'
